# Deluxe Fitness

> Premium lifestyle app for transformation, community, and elevated living.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Deluxe Fitness experience.
- [What we offer](/what-we-offer): Programs, coaching, and services.
- [Fitness](/fitness): Training methodology and outcomes.
- [Wellbeing](/wellbeing): Mind, recovery, and lifestyle pillars.
- [AI Coach](/coach): On-demand AI coaching features.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Memberships and pricing FAQ.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Member transformations and lifestyle imagery.
- [About](/about): Company story and philosophy.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.
